Show / Hide Table of Contents

Interface IToolTipControlInfo

Provides tooltip information used by the tooltip controller to display a hint.

This interface is implemented by the PhiRobotics UI Library and should not be implemented by user code.

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.ToolTips
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public interface IToolTipControlInfo
Remarks

The Object property uniquely identifies the visual element for which the tooltip is displayed.

The Object property and at least one of Title or Text must be set; otherwise, the tooltip will not be displayed.

To create an instance of IToolTipControlInfo, use the CreateControlInfo() method.

Examples

The following example demonstrates how to display a tooltip dynamically for a RichTextBox based on the character under the mouse cursor.

private RichTextBox richTextBox1;
private IToolTipController controller;
private IToolTipFactory toolTipFactory;

private void StartTooltipForRichTextBox(IUIFactoryService uIFactoryService)
{
    toolTipFactory = uIFactoryService.ToolTipFactory;
    controller = toolTipFactory.CreateController();

    richTextBox1.MouseMove += richTextBox1_MouseMove;
}

private void richTextBox1_MouseMove(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
{
    int chrIndex = richTextBox1.GetCharIndexFromPosition(e.Location);
    char chr = richTextBox1.GetCharFromPosition(e.Location);

    if (chrIndex < 0) { return; }

    string currentToolTipText = string.Format("Position: {0}, Character: {1}", chrIndex, chr);

    IToolTipControlInfo info = toolTipFactory.CreateControlInfo();
    info.Object = currentToolTipText;
    info.Text = currentToolTipText;
    info.ToolTipPosition = System.Windows.Forms.Form.MousePosition;

    controller.ShowHint(info);
}

Properties

AllowHtmlText

Gets or sets whether HTML formatting is supported in tooltips.

Declaration
bool AllowHtmlText { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

A bool value that specifies whether HTML formatting is supported in tooltips.

ForcedShow

Gets or sets whether the tooltip should be forcibly shown for the same visual element via the ShowHint(IToolTipControlInfo) method.

Declaration
ForcedShowKind ForcedShow { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
ForcedShowKind

A ForcedShowKind enumeration value that specifies whether the tooptip should be forcibly shown for the same visual element.
Remarks

The Object property identifies the visual element for which the tooltip should be shown. If the ForcedShow property is set to Default or No, the IToolTipController shows the tooltip for this visual element only as result of the first call to the ShowHint(IToolTipControlInfo) method. Further calls to this method are not in effect until the active object is changed. Set the ForcedShow property to Yes to forcibly show the tooltip for the same visual element via the ShowHint(IToolTipControlInfo) method even if the tooltip has already been shown.

The ForcedShow property is not intended for tooltips supplied by QueryObjectInfo event handlers. These tooltips are shown when the mouse hovers over the required visual element. See the QueryObjectInfo event for details.

HideHintOnMouseMove

Gets or sets whether the shown tooltip hides when an end-user moves the mouse.

Declaration
bool HideHintOnMouseMove { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

A bool value specifying whether the shown tooltip hides when an end-user moves the mouse.
Remarks

Use the HideHintOnMouseMove property to specify whether the displayed tooltip is hidden when an end-user moves the mouse. If this property is set to true, the tooltip hides immediately when an end-user starts moving the mouse. If it is set to false, the tooltip does not hide until the mouse pointer leaves the control for which the tooltip is shown.

To prevent a tooltip from being hidden on mouse moving, handle the QueryObjectInfo event, retrieve IToolTipControlInfo instance via Data's Info property and set its HideHintOnMouseMove property to false.

IconType

Gets or sets the kind of predefined icon to display in a tooltip.

Declaration
ToolTipIconType IconType { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
ToolTipIconType

A ToolTipIconType value specifying the kind of predefined icon to display.
Remarks

Use this property to specify the predefined icon to display in a tooltip. The size of icons is specified by the IsIconSizeLarge property.

Interval

Gets or sets the interval that must pass before a tooltip is displayed.

Declaration
int Interval { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
int

An int value that specifies the delay, in milliseconds.
Remarks

By default, a tooltip is displayed onscreen after a delay which is determined by the ToolTipController’s InitialDelay and ReshowDelay settings.

The Interval property allows you to override these settings and provide a custom delay. If the Interval property is set to a positive value the delay will be determined by this property, not by the ToolTipController.

If the ShowImmediately property is set to true the Interval property has no effect.

Object

Gets or sets an object which uniquely identifies the visual element for which the tooltip should be shown.

Declaration
object Object { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
object

An object which uniquely identifies the currently processed element.
Remarks

The Object property uniquely identifies the visual element for which the tooltip is displayed. This can be:

  • A control
  • A sub-element (e.g., a grid cell, node, or custom drawn region)

RichToolTip

Gets or sets a rich tooltip that will be displayed if the ToolTipType property is set to RichTip.

Declaration
IRichToolTip RichToolTip { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
IRichToolTip

An instance of IRichToolTip.
Remarks

The RichToolTip property contains a null reference by default. To display a RichToolTip, assign a IRichToolTip object to the RichToolTip property and set the ToolTipType property to RichTip.

ShowImmediately

Gets or sets whether a tooltip will be displayed immediately or after a delay.

Declaration
bool ShowImmediately { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

A bool value that specifies whether a tooltip will be displayed immediately or is delayed.
Remarks

If the ShowImmediately property is set to false the tooltip will be displayed after a delay which is specified by the InitialDelay.

Its also possible to override the tooltip controller’s settings and specify a custom delay via the Interval property.

Text

Gets or sets the tooltip’s text.

Declaration
string Text { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
string

A string that specifies the tooltip's text.
Remarks

The value assigned to the Text property is used when the ToolTipType is set to Standard.

When the ToolTipType is set to RichTip and the RichToolTip property is null, the Title and Text properties are used by the tooltip controller to automatically construct and display a rich tooltip.

Ensure that at least one of the Title or Text properties is assigned a non-empty value; otherwise, the tooltip will not be displayed.

Title

Gets or sets the tooltip’s title.

Declaration
string Title { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
string

A string that specifies the tooltip’s title.
Remarks

The value assigned to the Title property is used when the ToolTipType is set to Standard.

When the ToolTipType is set to RichTip and the RichToolTip property is null, the Title and Text properties are used by the tooltip controller to automatically construct and display a rich tooltip.

Ensure that at least one of the Title or Text properties is assigned a non-empty value; otherwise, the tooltip will not be displayed.

ToolTipAnchor

Gets or sets whether the tooltip is anchored relative to the mouse pointer or the owning control.

Declaration
ToolTipAnchor ToolTipAnchor { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
ToolTipAnchor

A ToolTipAnchor enumeration value that specifies whether the tooltip is anchored relative to the mouse pointer or the owning control.

ToolTipImage

Gets or sets the image to display within the current tooltip.

Declaration
Image ToolTipImage { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
Image

An Image object that specifies the image to display within the current tooltip.
Remarks

The tooltip image, if assigned, is displayed to the left of the tooltip’s title/text.

ToolTipLocation

Gets or sets the tooltip location.

Declaration
ToolTipLocation ToolTipLocation { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
ToolTipLocation

A ToolTipLocation enumeration value.

ToolTipPosition

Gets or sets the tooltip’s position in screen coordinates.

Declaration
Point ToolTipPosition { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
Point

A Point structure that specifies the tooltip’s position, in pixels, relative to the top left corner of the screen.

ToolTipType

Gets or sets the type of tooltip to be displayed.

Declaration
ToolTipTypes ToolTipType { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
ToolTipTypes

A ToolTipTypes enumeration value that specifies the type of tooltip to be displayed.
Remarks

Use this property to specify the type of tooltip to be displayed:

  • Standard
  • RichTip

Methods

Clone()

Creates a new instance of IToolTipControlInfo that is exact copy of this instance.

Declaration
IToolTipControlInfo Clone()
Returns
Type Description
IToolTipControlInfo

A new instance of IToolTipControlInfo that is exact copy of this instance.
